---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a broken link, UI issue, or functionality bug
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔗 URL (if applicable)

If this is a broken link, provide the URL:
- **Topic/Phase:** 
- **Current URL:** 
- **Expected behavior:** 

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 🌐 Browser & Device

- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Device:** [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Android 14]

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided enough detail to reproduce the issue
